rulings.Case Title: SIDNEY UNOBSKEY VS. SIMON MICHAEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendants Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Simon Michaels First Amended Cross Complaint And Motion For Attorneys Fees Ccp 425.16
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF/Cross Defendant SIDNEY UNOBSKEY's Special Motion To Strike Simon Michaels First Amended Cross Complaint And Motion For Attorneys Fees CCP 425.16 continued to November 9, 2018 to be heard by the honorable Charles Haines. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING VS. GRISEZ BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT JEROLD GRISEZ's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall allege facts, not conclusions, showing that Mr. Grisez is an "owner" within the meaning of Govt. Code 12927. Plaintiff shall further allege facts, in good faith and in light of Corp. Code 17703, showing that Mr. Grisez is personally liable. The Court notes that opposition failed to cite any authority for the proposition that Government Code 12927 trumps the protections afforded by Corp. Code to members of limited liability companies. If Plaintiff intends to pursue this action basing liability on this theory Plaintiff shall only do so in good faith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZACHARY BOOKMAN ET AL VS. FRANK NOLAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTs FRANK NOLAN, ANDREW WARREN and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1322. Notice includes no indication as to what portions of the complaint Defendants seeks to be stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZACHARY BOOKMAN ET AL VS. FRANK NOLAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTs FRANK NOLAN, ANDREW WARREN and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to cause of action for breach of contract is sustained with leave to amend for Plaitniff to allege a contract with Defendant, to attached the contract, and to allege which contractual provision was breached. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. This action by buyer against dual agent is not barred by CC 2079. Lyon v. Sup. Ct. (2012) 204 Cal.App.4th 1294. Cause of action for fraudulent concealment is alleged with requisite specificity. Causes of action for negligence, violation of 1102 and breach of fiduciary duty sufficiently alleged. While these causes of action are in part based of failure to investigate (for which Plaintiff has not authority), it is also based on failure to allege a known fact. Defendants fail to cite any authority for the proposition that agent/broker for purchaser has no duty to disclose a known fact that impacts the desirability or price of the property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. PAMELA JACKSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2018 line 5. rulings.Case Title: K5 FAMILY LLC VS. MAIRE DAWN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2018 line 6. PLAINTIFF K5 FAMILY LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER GRANTED. Motion is GRANTED, subject to opposition, as to Defendant Roliz-Maguidad. Motion is GRANTED as to Defendant Maire Dawn (Dwan). Plaintiff shifted its burden and defendant failed to create a triable issue of material fact with admissible competent evidence. Defendant's request to continue under CCP 437c(h) is DENIED. No compliant affidavit submitted to support the request, i.e. what facts may be obtained in discovery and reasons why those facts cannot be presented at this time. This action was filed on August 8, 2018 and Defendants appeared on August 13, 2018. = (501/REQ)
